bash /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/scripts/full-text-search.sh "Bean Validation" "重複チェック" "カスタムバリデータ" "validator" "バリデーション" "duplicate"

python3 -c "
import json

files = [
    '/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-getting-started-project-update.json',
    '/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-getting-started-update.json',
    '/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-getting-started-create.json',
]

keywords = ['重複', 'duplicate', 'ValidationUtil', 'createMessageForProperty', 'ApplicationException']

for f in files:
    with open(f) as fp:
        data = json.load(fp)
    for sec in data.get('sections', []):
        text = sec['title'] + ' ' + sec['content']
        if any(k in text for k in keywords):
            print(f'FILE: {f}')
            print(f'SECTION: {sec[\"id\"]} - {sec[\"title\"]}')
            print(sec['content'][:800])
            print('---')
"
